check: Role defined? Who is the AI acting as?
fix: Prepend: 'You are a senior [role]...'

check: Is there a clear, measurable success condition?
fix: Add: 'Success = [specific outcome]'

check: Uses: nice, cool, awesome, modern, good, beautiful?
fix: Replace with specific terms from SWAPS list
Add: WCAG AA, mobile-first, 60fps, bundle <200kb

check: Output format specified? Files, schema, format?
fix: Add: 'Generate: 1. [file] 2. [file] 3. [instructions]'
Append: 'Critique → refine structure → refine polish → output final only'
Add platform + viewport breakpoints
Pick from Design Vocab: glassmorphism, bento, neo-brutalism...
Specify: Framer Motion / GSAP / Three.js / Rive / CSS-only
Add: 'Design at 375px minimum. Scale up.'

check: Accessibility: WCAG AA, aria-labels, keyboard nav?
fix: Add: 'WCAG AA: 4.5:1 text, 3:1 UI, aria-labels, tab-navigable'
Add state spec: hover 150ms, press 80ms scale(0.97), focus-visible ring

check: Full stack specified? Framework + runtime + DB?
fix: Define: framework, ORM, auth, deploy target
Add: 'Handle all errors, no silent failures, typed errors'
Add: 'Full TypeScript, no any types, strict mode'
Add: 'Include unit tests for core logic'
Add: 'No TODOs. No lorem ipsum. No placeholder comments.'
Add: LCP<2.5s, CLS<0.1, <200kb JS, 60fps animation

check: Target audience defined with pain point?
fix: Add: '[Avatar] struggling with [specific pain]'
Add: 'Tone: [confident/warm/direct]. Avoid: [corporate/preachy]'
Add: 'End with CTA: [specific action] → [specific outcome]'

check: Word count or length constraint given?
fix: Add target length: tweets=280, headlines=10 words, posts=150-200

check: Trigger event defined? What starts the workflow?
fix: Define: webhook / schedule / user action / event
Add: 'On failure: retry X times → notify → log → halt'
Add: what the automation produces or stores at end
List all external tools the agent needs access to
Add: mobile-first at 375px, tablet 768px, desktop 1280px
Add: min 44px height/width on all interactive elements
Add: width=device-width, initial-scale=1, viewport-fit=cover
Add: input schema (zod), output schema, error codes

check: Auth strategy specified? (Bearer / API key / OAuth)
fix: Add: Authorization header type + token expiry strategy
Add: X requests per minute per API key, 429 on exceed
